first_impression: Valen Bannerhold presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Banner Anchorage.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Banner Anchorage harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Valen Bannerhold refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a local fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Valen Bannerhold adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
